name: clusters
description: Manage clusters — add existing instance cluster, edit instance cluster, list instance clusters. Supports standard CRUD operations through the REST API.

parameters.name: enabled
parameters.description: Determines if cluster is active or not, defaults to true

parameters.name: environment_scope
parameters.description: The associated environment to the cluster

parameters.name: namespace_per_environment
parameters.description: Deploy each environment to a separate Kubernetes namespace

parameters.name: management_project_id
parameters.description: The ID of the management project

parameters.name: managed
parameters.description: Determines if GitLab will manage namespaces and service accounts for this cluster, defaults to true

parameters.name: platform_kubernetes_attributes[api_url]
parameters.description: URL to access the Kubernetes API

parameters.name: platform_kubernetes_attributes[ca_cert]
parameters.description: TLS certificate (needed if API is using a self-signed TLS certificate)
